title: OJCP Error Response
description: Standard error response envelope returned by all OJCP tools when a request fails.

error_code.description: Machine-readable error code. Verification-specific errors use the verification_errors array in submit_application responses.

message.description: Human-readable error message suitable for agent logging or display to the user.

retry_after_seconds.description: Seconds to wait before retrying. Present when error_code is 'rate_limited'.

details.description: Additional error context. Shape varies by error_code.
